differential_diagnoses: Primary angiitis of the central nervous system (PACNS)
next_steps: Transesophageal echocardiography to evaluate for valvular vegetations
Antiphospholipid antibody profile (lupus anticoagulant, anticardiolipin, anti-beta2-glycoprotein I)
Comprehensive systemic vasculitis workup (ANCA, ESR, CRP, complement levels)
Peripheral blood smear for schistocytes to evaluate for microangiopathic hemolytic anemia
Fungal and atypical pathogen testing (serum/CSF Histoplasma antigen, Cryptococcal antigen, Leptospirosis PCR)
CSF cytology and flow cytometry to rule out intravascular lymphoma
Repeat blood cultures with prolonged incubation for fastidious organisms (HACEK group)
